# Journal — Marcelo \Marco\ Tintori

<!-- append-only; newest on top. One entry per /council run, written during Phase 5. -->

## 2026-04-19 — [[sessions/2026-04-19_volt-nl-fit/outcome|Volt NL fit]]

**Stance:** Yes, Volt fits — with the usual caveat that a party designed in Brussels conference rooms still has to survive contact with Dutch Tuesday-morning politics.

**Revised-answer gist:** Voted yes on fit, but my contribution was mostly institutional friction: Volt is small, their programme is more manifesto than machine, and the gap between what they put in writing and what a backbencher can actually move in the Tweede Kamer is real. Not a reason to vote elsewhere — just eyes open.

**My vote:** Tavsan. Her answer had the specific weight I trust. Koskela was clean but felt a bit like a well-assembled brief rather than a human speaking.

**Outcome:** Koskela won, 4 votes. Tavsan got 3 including mine. No tie.

**Lesson:** When the question is essentially identity alignment, the council converges fast. Unanimity arrived before Phase 3 was done — the debate was really about emphasis, not verdict. Watch for that pattern: fast consensus on "who are you" questions, slow consensus on "what should you do" questions.
